questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Digital Certificates?
options: Inefficient scaling of Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), Certification Authorities (CA) chain verification loops.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), Certification Authorities (CA) chain verification loops.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), Certification Authorities (CA) chain verification loops scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
